---
title: "Computational Statistics and Monte Carlo Methods"
subtitle: "Core Mathematics — Year 2"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Computational Statistics and Monte Carlo Methods

**Track**: Core Mathematics — Year 2

The computational methods that make modern statistics possible. Monte Carlo, bootstrap, EM algorithm, and the theory behind simulation-based inference.

## Table of Contents

1. Random Number Generation and Simulation
2. Monte Carlo Integration
3. Bootstrap Methods
4. Permutation Tests and Exact Methods
5. The EM Algorithm and Extensions
6. Sequential Monte Carlo (Particle Filters)
7. Cross-Validation and Predictive Assessment
8. Optimization Algorithms for Statistics

---

## Chapter 1: Random Number Generation and Simulation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Monte Carlo Integration

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Bootstrap Methods

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Permutation Tests and Exact Methods

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: The EM Algorithm and Extensions

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Sequential Monte Carlo (Particle Filters)

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Cross-Validation and Predictive Assessment

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Optimization Algorithms for Statistics

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
